
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
config = ({
  view: { stroke: null }, 
  background: "transparent", // "#f1f1f1"
  font: "Montserrat", // "Century Gothic" "FFDaxPro"
  fontSize: 14,
  concat: { spacing: 20 },
  padding: {
    top: 20, 
    right: 5, 
    bottom: 20,
    left: 5,
    },
  title: {
    offset: 0, 
    fontSize: 16, 
    subtitleFontSize: 14,
  },
  facet: {
    fontSize: 14,
    labelFontSize: 14, 
    titleFontSize: 14,
    titleFontWeight: "normal",
  },
  axis: {
    labelFontSize: 14, 
    titleFontSize: 14,
    titleFontWeight: "normal",
  },
  axisX: {
    grid: false,
    labelPadding: 10,
  },
  axisY: {
    domain: false,
    ticks: false,
    labelPadding: 10,
  },
  legend: {
    labelFontSize: 14, 
    titleFontSize: 14,
    titleFontWeight: "normal",
    orient: "top",
    title: false,
  },
  mark: {
    fontSize: 14
  },
  locale: {
    number: {
      decimal: ",", 
      thousands: " ", 
      format: ",.0f", 
      grouping: [3]
    },
    time: {
      dateTime: "%A %e %B %Y, %X",
      date: "%d/%m/%Y",
      time: "%H:%M:%S",
      periods: ["AM", "PM"],
      days: [
        "Montag",
        "Dienstag",
        "Mittwoch",
        "Donnerstag",
        "Freitag",
        "Samstag",
        "Sonntag"
      ],
      shortDays: [
        "Mo", 
        "Di", 
        "Mi", 
        "Do", 
        "Fr", 
        "Sa", 
        "So"
      ],
      months: [
        "Jänner",
        "Februar",
        "März",
        "April",
        "Mai",
        "Juni",
        "Juli",
        "August",
        "September",
        "Oktober",
        "November",
        "Dezember"
      ],
      shortMonths: [
        "Jan",
        "Feb",
        "Mar",
        "Apr",
        "Mai",
        "Jun",
        "Jul",
        "Aug",
        "Sep",
        "Okt",
        "Nov",
        "Dez"
      ]
    }
  },
})
```
